restaurant_name: Drishya Lounge - Best Lounge in New Baneshwor
review_text: The food was delicious and tasty. staff was very friendly and attentive. You can see 360 view from here most recommended place

restaurant_name: Drishya Lounge - Best Lounge in New Baneshwor
review_text: Its honestly one of the prettiest spots I’ve been to in Kathmandu. The rooftop view is insane, you can literally see the whole city and even the mountains on a clear day. The vibe is super chill, the music is good, and it’s the kind of place you want to sit for hours just soaking it in.

restaurant_name: Drishya Lounge - Best Lounge in New Baneshwor
review_text: It was my first time visit @Drishya lounge and i felt very good and peaceful. It has a friendly, warm loving environment with quality service. I was very mesmerized with the roof top view with it's captivating beauty.

restaurant_name: Drishya Lounge - Best Lounge in New Baneshwor
review_text:
I had the pleasure of dining at Drishya Lounge today, and I can confidently say it was an exceptional experience from start to finish.

The food was absolutely fantastic! Every dish was expertly prepared, bursting with flavor, and beautifully presented. From the appetizers to the main course, each bite was a delightful experience. The ingredients felt fresh, and the seasoning was spot-on. The Chicken BBQ stood out as a true highlight — the balance of flavors was simply perfect.

The ambiance was equally impressive. The interior was stylish, with a cozy yet modern feel that made it perfect for both casual dining and special occasions. The lighting was just right, creating a relaxed atmosphere that made you feel instantly at ease. The staffs were attentive and friendly, ensuring we had everything we needed without being overbearing.

The only slight disappointment was the food stuffs quantity in relation to the price. However, this could likely be attributed to the prime location of the lounge, which naturally drives up operational and maintenance costs.

Overall, this restaurant offers a memorable dining experience that I would highly recommend. Whether you're looking for a great place for a date night, a family gathering, or a night out with friends, this spot checks all the boxes. I can’t wait to return!

restaurant_name: Drishya Lounge - Best Lounge in New Baneshwor
review_text: I recently visited Drishya Lounge, and I must say it exceeded my expectations! From the stylish interiors to the mouthwatering dishes, everything was spot on. Their food menu offers a great variety, and the drinks are perfectly mixed. If you're looking for the best restaurant in Kathmandu for a fun evening or a casual dining experience, this is the place to be. I searched for a restaurant near me, and I'm glad I found this gem! Can't wait to visit again.

Super expensive, the menu was repetitive, not enough variety.
The staff are polite and friendly, however the food can be a lot better.
500+ for a frappe is excessive, don’t get me started on the momo platter.
Momo platter- 12 pieces of garbage, and there were more French fries than momo. What the hell was the momo drenched in Mayonnaise and strawberry jam/syrup???

Do better.

I really loved going to twenty fourty. Probably would go there again. It is one of the best places to go with your friends. I liked the food too. I ordered a Mac and cheese and it tasted very good and creamy. No complaints on the food. The atmosphere was really good. The staff were responsive and understanding. The pricing is on the moderate side, but it pays off!! Definitely a good place for dinner dates. The ambiance in the evening is very good.

I recently visited 2040 Kathmandu, and I had a wonderful experience. The restaurant was very clean and they maintained great hygiene, which made the atmosphere comfortable and pleasant.
The food was the highlight of my visit. I tried the Mustang Aloo and Pepperoni Pizza, and the taste was amazing. The Mustang Aloo was full of flavor and really memorable, and the Pepperoni Pizza was delicious and perfectly prepared. I truly enjoyed every bite.
The service was also very nice and the staff were friendly and helpful. Overall, it was a great dining experience and I would definitely recommend this place to have really nice pepperoni pizza in Nepal specially.

An industrial-chic space with a distinct garage vibe. The setting is visually interesting, but the culinary experience was simply 'okaish.' It feels like a reliable spot for a casual meet-up, but it hasn’t quite mastered the 'wow' factor just yet.
Perfect place for refreshments with your loved ones. We had celebrated bday here, they had live music too. Food and ambience is quite good.

A great place to hang out and enjoy delicious food at a very reasonable price. The ambience is pleasant and makes it a comfortable spot to spend time with friends or family. The food tastes really good, and everything we tried was well worth the price. I’d especially recommend trying their pizza. Overall, a great value-for-money restaurant that I’d happily visit again.

This restaurant is located in Purano Baneshwor, near Apex College, and offers ample parking space for both four-wheelers and two-wheelers, which is very convenient. The ambience is excellent, creating a pleasant and comfortable dining atmosphere.

The food overall was average, as was the service. Among the dishes, the Mustang Aalu stood out as the best option compared to the others. However, the buffalo wings were disappointing they lacked flavor and the portions were quite small. On a positive note, the staff were friendly, supportive, and polite, which added to the overall experience.

Food is good. Service needs to be improved. Hot water means HOT not lukewarm. Our order was forgotten twice. Second order did not come at all. If this type of service continues you will be just another restaurant nothing special.

Must say a really good place for having a chill time.
Ambience was great and so was the food.
I really liked their hospitality, service was really fast and the staffs were polite too.
Taste and quantity of food really justified the price but drinks were average.
Overall we had a great time.

Just Another Restaurant is anything but ordinary! The space is beautifully designed, offering both cozy indoor seating and a charming outdoor area. The service was impressively quick, making the dining experience smooth and enjoyable.I ordered the burger platter and fish fingers—both were excellent. The burger was juicy and flavorful, while the fish fingers were crispy and perfectly cooked. Overall, a great spot for good food and a relaxed ambiance. Definitely worth a visit!

I'm writing this review as I am sipping masala tea in this very restaurant. I had ordered Garlic Hot Wings and it was delicious. Compliments to the chef. The ambience was good. Music was playing in the background. Service was impeccable and the staff were nice and polite. You could easily fill your stomach for around 500-1000 nrs. Considering everything I found the price reasonable enough. While I was reading the reviews, I noticed no one had posted pictures of the menu, so I thought it would be helpful to add pictures of the menu. Enjoy your food and time.

With enough parking space for both 2 and 4 wheelers, the place's food is worth the money. Price being on medium side is justified by the taste and quantity of the food, humble staffs and the ambience of the place.
Definitely a go to place.
Nice ambiance, caring service, big surprize every time food came to the table. it just looked so awesome and tasted even better👍

I feel so good to be part of this Red Cliff.I recommend everyone through this comment everyone should come here  and have some foods ,the environment also good and peaceful ....you may forget every stress for sure...Thankyou Red cliff for the best service and hospitality ..mm.
Went here for a free coke offer and ordered a french fries as well to go with the coke. The food was well cooked. It arrived preetly quickly. Would try other items as well in future.

I recently visited this place and had an okay experience, but there is definitely room for improvement. While the ambiance is quite nice and provides a good vibe for a meal, several factors held back the overall experience.
The Downsides:
Hygiene Issues: I was quite disappointed to see flies hovering around the table. It felt very unhygienic and made it difficult to enjoy the food comfortably.
Service: The staff wasn't very proactive. We had to constantly call them over for every little thing. Ideally, when guests are present, the staff should be attentive and check in to see if anything is needed. That level of hospitality was unfortunately missing.
Food: The food was average—nothing particularly stood out, though the presentation was decent.
Overall: It’s a good spot for the atmosphere, but the management needs to focus on pest control and training their staff to be more attentive to guests.

Went to Michael Grill in Mid-Baneshwor. The ambience was good, and the staff were friendly and welcoming when we entered. We ordered a couple of dishes, but there was no consistency in the food. We ordered the same items, yet the taste was different in each dish.

This is easily one of the best place for sekuwa in kathmandu. We had tried pork sekuwa several times and I must say its the best dish.
The while fish is also ine of my favourite dish.
The ambience is very good.
The customer service is awesome.
Recommended for everyone

Great place for juicy sekuwa and Nepali grilled items. Cozy ambience, friendly staff, and reasonable prices. Good for casual hangouts. Portions can feel a bit small and service may be slow during rush hours — but overall, tasty and reliable.
Excellent place for food.Menuka provided excellent and friendly service. Very attentive and professional. Thank you for the great hospitality

address: M8WV+R4F, Ghumti Kumari Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Absolutely loved my experience here! The coffee,mocktails and cocktails were crafted to perfection—balanced flavors, fresh ingredients, and beautiful presentation. Each drink felt unique and thoughtfully made. The ambiance was just as impressive: cozy yet vibrant, with the perfect blend of music, lighting, and décor to set the mood. Whether you’re here for a night out or a relaxed evening, this place nails it. Highly recommend!

address: M8WV+R4F, Ghumti Kumari Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Very friendly staff and service was amazing.  I can't expect that. Best place for gathering and enjoying with students or family🫡.I suggest everyone who wants to drinks beer with enjoying pop vibe music 🎶 😊.

address: M8WV+R4F, Ghumti Kumari Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Never have I had a more pleasant meal. Jheer baneshwor’s staff members were very polite and helpful, going above and beyond to make us feel welcome. Thank you Jheer baneshwor for the wonderful care given to us. Forever repeat customers!”

address: M8WV+R4F, Ghumti Kumari Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: I recently ate at jheer sekura, and the overall experience was disappointing. Along with slow service, although the staff behaved well, the owner’s(moti aaimai) behavior was very poor. At first, I was seated at one table, then I was asked to move to another table where I was just getting comfortable. Later, I was told to move to yet another table. This made me feel very uncomfortable.I think the jheer sekuwa  needs to improve its customer service. And I recommend all of new costumer choose another place for better feels.

address: M8WV+R4F, Ghumti Kumari Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
Food is Not Bad.
Drinks on MRP only.
Reasonable Pricing.
Staffs are attentive and friendly.
They serve Chilled Beer and Sekuwas.
Open Ambiance.
No Drama of Service charge and VAT.

Its a Place where People and come and have a GOOD TIME without having to worry about the exorbitant prices usually charged by the Restaurants.

I think Jheer has brought about a Revolution in the Food and Beverage Sector.

Well Done and keep up the good work.

restaurant_name: Jimbu Thakali by Capital Grill, New Baneshwor
address: M8PR+WC9 Minbhawan, Minbhawan Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
I recently visited Jimbu Thakali, and I must say, it was an incredible experience from start to finish!
The food was the absolute highlight—authentic, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. It’s easily some of the best Thakali I’ve ever had. But it wasn’t just the food that impressed me; the ambiance was cozy and welcoming, making it the perfect spot for a meal with friends or family.
A huge shoutout to the staff and waiters as well. The service was top-notch—they were incredibly attentive and the serving style was professional and prompt. Everything truly felt 'Babal'!
If you’re looking for a premium Thakali experience with great vibes and even better food, I highly recommend this place. I’ll definitely be coming back!"

restaurant_name: Jimbu Thakali by Capital Grill, New Baneshwor
address: M8PR+WC9 Minbhawan, Minbhawan Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
We visited for brunch and unfortunately had a very disappointing service experience, despite the food being delicious. We were the first customers to be seated, yet we were the last to be served. Briefings for more than 1 hour. At the very least, there should be someone available to check on customers. My foreign friend was extremely hungry, which made the long wait even more uncomfortable.
We also requested warm water, which never arrived despite asking three times.
This restaurant used to be my favorite place for lunch and dinner. Every time I visit Nepal, Jimbo Thakali is always on my list, and I spoke very highly of it to my foreign friend. Sadly, this visit was a big disappointment and not the experience I expected or wanted to share.
I truly hope the management improves their service, as the food and reputation deserve better.

restaurant_name: Jimbu Thakali by Capital Grill, New Baneshwor
address: M8PR+WC9 Minbhawan, Minbhawan Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: "We had a wonderful time at Jimbu Thakali! The food was authentic and delicious, but the service really stole the show. Our waiter, Mr. Samuel, was excellent—incredibly friendly, attentive, and always available right when we needed him. It’s rare to get such great customer service where you feel genuinely looked after. Thanks to Samuel and the team for a great meal!"

restaurant_name: Jimbu Thakali by Capital Grill, New Baneshwor
address: M8PR+WC9 Minbhawan, Minbhawan Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: This location has major cleanliness concerns. We were seated in a corner table and ordered a mango lassi, only to be served a milk-flavoured drink with no mango taste at all. The branch is a shambles and requires immediate intervention from management.

restaurant_name: Jimbu Thakali by Capital Grill, New Baneshwor
address: M8PR+WC9 Minbhawan, Minbhawan Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
The food is fresh, authentic, and served beautifully. The set comes with perfectly cooked.
Must try there premium set

Talking about the ambience and sitting area, it is really good.
The pizza wasn't good at all, felt like the cheese they used was low quality as we couldn't even finish half of the pizza and gave it to the cute dog in the picture.
Had to wait alot for the pizza to come as well.
The Mustang Alu wasn't cooked properly it was raw.
Also, the Mocha Frappe was like a cold coffee, nothing special.

We visited Baneshwor Garden Restaurant for my sister’s birthday. The ambience was amazing and made the celebration really special.
The chicken Szechwan was a must-try – so tasty and well-prepared! The pizza, however, was below average, and the drinks were just okay.
The atmosphere was wonderful, and the staff were very friendly. For music lovers, they even have live music, which adds to the charm.
Overall, it’s a great place for a date, family gathering, or celebration.
Food is good also offers an happy hours , atmosphere is good ,service is good .
Food is average, service  is late. We waited for almost 1 hour for the food we ordered. Not my/our type place.

The place is good if not the best.
They have an open space with ample greenery.
The staffs are well mannnered.
The drinks are reasonably priced.
The ambiance is further accentuated by Live Musics during weekends.
They have a big bar that looks good.

The Timmur Chicken could have been better.
The Chiken Skewer was good though.

At the very centre area of Baneshwor lies this place at the rooftop giving us views of the valley and also the BICC . The staffs were attentive. The place was good, aesthetic as well. The food was so yumm. Everything we tried tasted good. It's a perfect place to go with friends or family as well. There was live music too which was too good. I enjoyed it thoroughly.

Chicken items are okayish. They taste good but the portion were small compared to the price. The pizza is not recommended, it was like having cheese over biscuit! Atmosphere is nice.
Recommended for get togethers with bbq, meat items and beer!

I visited this place today, and I was immediately struck by its truly cozy and inviting vibe. The staff were super friendly and attentive from the moment I walked in, which always makes for a great experience. I absolutely loved their Paneer Pakora, which was perfectly crispy and flavorful, and the Oreo milkshake was a delightful, creamy treat – definitely a must-try! While the pizza I ordered was just okay for my taste, I know others rave about their tender grilled meats and flavorful marinades, so I'm keen to try those next time. My only real gripe was that the music seemed a little too loud, which made it tough to have a comfortable conversation without raising our voices. Despite that, the overall ambiance is definitely a highlight, and it's clear why many other reviewers consistently praise the diverse range of delicious side dishes and the welcoming atmosphere. It truly feels like a great spot to relax and enjoy some good food.

The ambience and the food is good. It also has a rooftop with swing. The view from the rooftop is awesome. However, the hospitality    needs some improvements. It has just been over a month that this place has come into operation. Hopefully they will consider the hospitality. Other things are great.

Food used to be amazing but it was awful today. Found a piece of plastic in carbonara and they said it was garlic peel, like we wouldn’t know the difference. Asked for chinese chop suey and specifically said chop suey not chopstick but it took forever to be served and when we asked the wait staff, she brought out a pair of CHOPSTICKS. Incompetent service and awful food. Never going back.
The food is worth the price and the hospitality is top notch which are extremely rare these days in Nepal…

Newly opened R&B in New Baneshwor, Kathmandu!!

Absolutely best place for a hang out, live music, great food and quality time woth froesnds and family!! Definitely recommend! Do visit guysss 🫶✨
Best open momo around Baneswor. The momo is just wow. It melts in my mouth. Been here more than 3 and momo has always been the must order.

Went there through a friend, didn't expect much from a normal restaurant at the beginning but the ambience was promising for a conversation as private spaces are available and the service was quick which was never expected from a copy place but not a single flaw on quality everything we ate was really good. We are making sure to stay there atleast once a week.

food was delicious
Chill involvement with live music
Staff is very friendly ♥️♥️♥️ special thanks for mis Aliya Rai

Good place for a few drinks after office hours. Middle of city. Fun place. Cozy environment. Free popcorn/peanuts with drink. Can also bring drinks from outside (corkage charge extra) and a new concept of brink your bottle, if you can’t finish, lock you bottle in the restaurant, come back any other day and have it again (corkage charge only once)

Lovely Ambience & Great Service!

The ambience is beautiful and inviting. As a new restaurant, the menu is limited, and some dishes could use slight improvement in taste—but I’m sure they’ll get even better with time.

What I loved most was the excellent service and the charming atmosphere. And the Sekuwa Chatni? Absolutely mind-blowing!

I have ordered biryani from here before and it was one of the best. Today, I ordered naan and American chop suey. The naan was good, but unfortunately the chop suey was disappointing. The sauce was too thin and watery, and it was overly spicy. The quantity of vegetables was very less, and usually a fried egg is included, but this time it was missing. I hope the quality can be improved in the future.

Tried this pizza recently and was really let down. The cheese layer was a complete disaster—thick, rubbery, and tasteless. It looked appealing at first, but the texture was off and it felt more like chewing plastic than melted cheese. No stretch, no creaminess, just a bland overload of poor-quality cheese.

The base was underwhelming and soggy in parts, and overall, it felt like the pizza was rushed and thrown together without any care. Even the seasoning on the side couldn’t save it. Not worth the price at all. Definitely won’t be coming back for this.
Bottle House offers an exceptional dining experience, combining flavorful food, a stylish ambiance, and top-notch service.

I went there and saw they have a 50% off on pizza so I Oder one and in pizza there was too less cheese and when I was done with pizza no one came to table to clear the dirty dish was there whole time. They really need to train their staff about service.atmosphere was great

Centrally located in Baneshwor, Maven Cafe is one of the most happening place in the town. The ambience is great. The food is also good. The view of busy street of Baneshwor from this place is awesome. The place has indoor seating arrangements with a lovely bar as well. This place also offers live music on weekends and special days. This place is suitable with both friends and families. The menu is also fine. However, the service needs to be improved. Please visit if around Baneshwor area.

Noisy restaurant, loud music, closed AC.
Momo: Good quality, seriously less amount of achar.

Cheese ball: mostly potatoes, little cheese. Not so good.
Service was very nice  and mainly the place was very quite really love it hope to be there again with my loved one🤙🏻❤️

Sorry to tell u that I ordered strawberry milkshake but I didn’t like it I think u should enhance ur flavour and I did order chicken chowein which was pretty good over all I will rate it 3 out of 5 thankyou!!!!
Newly opened place..the spicy wings are spot on also their prices are reasonable
Best ambiance and tasty food just wow worth it.visit and thank me later.

If you’re around Baneshwor, this restricts is seriously one of the most underrated spots. The place has such a nice, cozy vibe, and the staff are super friendly and welcoming.

The food is what really surprised me. It’s mostly simple dishes, but you can tell the chef has put real thought into giving everything their own twist. Nothing feels basic. The loaded nachos and fries are easily the best I’ve had you can taste how fresh the ingredients are from the very first bite. Everything is flavorful, generously portioned, and still affordable.

Overall, such a good experience. Highly recommended.
Best place I have ever visit you should try it you won't regret itt

‘Good food, good mood’
Ever heard that?
This is the place where you feel it.
Amazing place to hang out.😎
Good ambience, excellent staff behaviour special Sri Krishna Dongal, he is very polite and food quality was awesome

I recently visited The Grill Nation and had a wonderful experience. The food was really tasty with a great variety, and everything felt fresh and well prepared. The ambiance is warm, clean, and very pleasant, making it perfect for family or group dining. Staff were extremely attentive, polite, and quick to assist, which truly elevated the overall experience. Definitely a place worth visiting again. Highly recommended!

I took my wife to Grill Nation the other night, and it’s a solid place with a lot to like. The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, buzzing with a family friendly feel that seems tailor made for a big group rather than just the two of us. You can easily imagine a loud, happy table of relatives digging in together. Service was spot on, our waiter was a gem, super friendly and quick to check on us, which showed they actually give a damn about their customers. The real winner was the buffet dinner, unlimited food for Rs 1500 per person, drinks not included. It felt like we’d crashed a wedding party, with hot dishes and tons of options to pile on your plate.

The grilled starters, though, didn’t quite live up to the hype. They’re supposed to be live grilled, but these were obviously pre cooked, tasty enough, just not that fresh, smoky goodness I was craving. It wasn’t a dealbreaker, though; the rest of the meal carried the night. All in all, Grill Nation’s a good pick, great value, nice vibes, and a team that’s got your back. I’m giving it 4 stars and would definitely head back, especially with a bigger crew to really soak in the experience.

We came here for the first time and I must say it is the best restaurant in town with unique concept,which is located in battispatali. I recommend it to all my friends and relatives to come here once and give them a chance to serve you , I am 100 percent sure that you won’t regret .Food was delicious, ambience is perfect and staff are very friendly and big thanks to Niraj Gautam(staff )for your hospitality and thank you again for making our tiktok so professionally 🥰🥰 @the grill nation

Grill nation is a very beautiful place with very beautiful waiter. Mr jeevan praja and Mr. Srikrishna are very helpful, nonchalant and have a lot of aura. Do click selfies with them when visiting them.

A taste of Burma with a character!

The Noodles Bar is a small, distinctive eatery run by a Burma-returned lady who has been sharing the flavors of Burma. She started running this restaurant for nearly five years now. Her personal touch with Burmese cuisines is very much felt in the food and the atmosphere.

This place is perfect for anyone who enjoys exploring less-common cuisines, especially Burmese food, which is quite rare to find. The menu is refreshingly different, featuring dishes that reflect authentic Burmese ingredients and preparation styles.

During our visit, we tried the Dishes Khau Suey Tau and Laphet Tau. These Dishes were advised to use by one humble and polite staff.

Khau Suey Tau, an interesting dish as  served and after seasoning it with an unique chilli sauce. We ordered another one of the same dish for our son.

Laphet Tau, the famous Burmese tea-leaf salad, was truly unique. The fermented tea leaves, fried beans, peanuts, garlic, and chili oil created a bold, and a tangy taste which adventurous food lovers will genuinely appreciate.This dish would really go best with a chilled beer, though we tried only the dish this time.

Considering the uniqueness of the cuisines and the effort to preserve authenticity, it feels satisfying and worthwhile.

The place itself has a very local, no-frills vibe. It’s not a typical dine-in restaurant, but the warmth and friendliness of the owner and staff make the experience pleasant and welcoming. Service is simple, honest, and heartfelt.

Overall, The Noodles Bar may not be flashy or “special” in a conventional sense, but it offers something far more meaningful: a genuine culinary window into Burma. Must go place for those who are open to trying something different and appreciate food with a story behind it, this place is definitely worth a visit.

I went to the Noodles Bar today for lunch and ordered one plate of steamed chicken momo and Ou-no khau suey, which I was trying for the first time. The momo was decent, but the noodles were not that tasty for me. They had a very strong garlic flavor, which made me cough since I cannot handle too much garlic at once.
In terms of price, it felt reasonable for what was served. The place has a very local vibe with extra local flavors, which some people might really enjoy. Since it is more of a small local shop, the service is not like typical dine-in restaurants, but the staff are friendly and welcoming, which makes the experience pleasant.
Overall, it was not bad. If you are up for trying something different, you can give it a shot, but I would not say it is anything special. They could improve by adding some more common items to their menu to balance out the options.

I come here often after my friend introduced me to this place. The food is just too good. Besides the falooda and Biryani and I have tried almost everything really. Their special is Burmese food. So please try that before anything else. Here is their names with my rating for each from high to low.
Khau suey Tau      - 9/10
Ou-no khau suey - 8.5/10
Thopu nuey           - 8.5/10
Mohinga                - 7.5/10
Thopu cha             - 7.5/10
Mix Padkauda       - 7/10
Laphet tau             - 7/10
Thopu tau              - 5/10 ( do no try to eat this alone.
Besides these the momo is good too. 8/10

The noodles are great here. I tried the khau suey and Mohinga—truly authentic Burmese noodle dish. The lady serving and cooking was smiling the whole time, and many local customers came by. I might be the rare foreigner here.

Very unique taste. Everyone must give a try. The taste at the beginning might feel like bland, because we are not that habitual in these Burmese dishes. When you keep on eating you will start loving it. Something different something unique which is not available anywhere else. Must give it a try.
Best Place, Best Quality of food, Nice Ambiance
Loved all the food and ambience, definitely would be back for delicious purbali khana 😍
The food was amazing. The staffs are very welcoming and it’s a insta worthy spot

Very unique & authentic food in Kathmandu. The quality of food was amazing. I loved their customer service. I would recommend everyone to come and visit this place. Best place for friends and families. Best Pork Momo . Thank you .

Yaba Yang is certainly a place where you can enjoy a very quality time with great food, atmosphere and brilliant service. It’s an elegant place only for those who value quality over quantity. The food prices are very affordable specially considering this place in the capital city plus this place is truely a gem when it comes to the high end decor and feeling of elegance. I would highly recommend this place for any occasion specially for family gathering. Been open only for few months, Yaba Yang has really brought new light to the restaurant life where you are meant to relax and enjoy the contemporary side of our Nepalese cuisine. Very proud of this new gem and wish them all the best. Worth the visit ❤️
Taste local food.

We had a really wonderful experience here. The food was delicious, and everything we tried was full of flavor. The servers were extremely kind, attentive, and made us feel very welcome throughout our visit. There was live music when we went, and the musician was absolutely fabulous,it added such a beautiful vibe to the evening and made the experience even more special. Would definitely love to come back again.
Local is name only, place is nice. Food is pricey, little spicy and very delicious. On second thought, the intense flavors justify the name quite well.

This restaurant is conveniently located near Old Baneshwor Chowk on the way to Sinamangal, making it easily accessible. It offers basement parking for guests, which is a great plus. The menu includes a variety of delicious options, including KFC-style chicken, pizzas, and more, ensuring there’s something for everyone to enjoy.

The service was impressive, with friendly and supportive staff who made the dining experience even better. The food and drinks were tasty and well-prepared, leaving a satisfying impression. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, enhanced by live music in the evenings that creates a lively yet relaxing vibe.

A wonderful spot to enjoy good food, great service, and pleasant ambiance—highly recommended for casual outings with friends and family.

We went there after a late-night movie around 10 PM. Their Google profile mentioned they were open until 11 PM, so we decided to stop by. We even confirmed with a server if they were still taking orders, and he said yes, just the last order and asked us to sit.

As we looked through the menu, the staff rushed us, mentioning it was late and they had many dishes to wash. Honestly, I don’t see why customers need to hear about that. Still, we kept it simple and ordered dishes that should have been quick.

The first dish, corn sadheko, was just plain sour. The chicken chilli was average at best, but the real disappointment was the mixed chowmein. The noodles were bland, pale, and looked like they had just been boiled with some egg and meat tossed in. It was so bad that even though we were hungry, we couldn’t finish it.

If the staff and kitchen were in such a hurry to close up, they should have just turned us away. We would have understood. But agreeing to serve us and then bringing out inedible food felt disrespectful. At the end of the day, we’re still paying customers. Definitely not coming back here again.

Very spacious and pleasing place in between the chaos of new baneshwor. Really loved the ambience and the staffs are really very sweet and polite. Loved the hospitality.
Stopped for coffeee break but will definitely visit this place again
Masala tea was not much good though machine bata banako bhayera hola but its fine staff le preinform garnu bhako thhyo.
Highly recommended.
Ramroooo chha space .

The ambience is amazing to say the least and to top it off the food does not disappoint. I went for a lunch and for a vegetarian like me I would definitely recommend. However the menu doesn’t include many vegetarian options but the available vegetarian options do not disappoint at all. Also thank you to Manjil Deuja Ji for assisting us and being so helpful and considerate.

Visited with friends for breakfast, intending to stay through late lunch. The breakfast and the drinks were great. The ambiance is lovely, very airy, spacious, and aesthetically pleasing.

Unfortunately, the experience took a sharp turn because the restaurant was uncomfortably cold. With high ceilings and winter temperatures, the entire place felt freezing. We requested the staff to turn on the heater, which was clearly available for customer use and placed right next to the table we were seated at. We had chosen that table for this exact reason, as the restaurant felt quite chilly the moment we walked in. However, we were told that it was not allowed and that heaters are only turned on in the evenings. This strict heater policy was honestly baffling and felt unnecessarily rigid.

The place may feel warmer during the day, but for a restaurant that is recommended for breakfast, the morning temperature should be far more welcoming. Instead of adjusting the environment for customers, we were asked to move to a “warmer” area, which we did, but it made no difference.

Because of the cold, we finished our breakfast and rushed to find another place where we could actually sit comfortably and continue with our lunch.

Probably a great spot during hot summers, but not a comfortable choice in winter mornings.
The food was absolutely delicious, and the drinks were refreshing. Highly recommended!🫶, will visit again 🥰.
Ambience is great . Food is also very nice. Hospitality isn’t that great . Overall nice place to hangout and celebrate.
Awesome Food Good service Beautiful Ambience Bento box was great Best in budget pricing Worth it

Absolutely loved this place!
Really cosy vibe, super friendly staff, and top-notch food. Everything was fresh, full of flavour, and nicely presented. Would definitely recommend it to anyone after a great dining experience.

— Dipesh Thapa, Sindhuli (SindhuliMart)

Well, few goods and few areas for improvement.
1. Finding a car parking in this location is an instant plus. Though only space for 4-5 cars, it is a huge feel good factor.
2. Ambience is just so so. Tin roof, untidy cloths hung underneath, ununiform chairs, sofa and tables. Also, tables had patches of burnt holes, glass tables broken. Overall vibe gave quite cheap feel.
3. Cleanliness of partition glasses and toilets are also below par.
4. Wait was a bit too long depite nit being rush hour.
5. We had proper meal set here. Rice and dal was good. Curry was served cold! Also chicken curry reminded me an old advert "Khaali noon ra pyaaj haalnus, baaki kaam meat masala le garchha!" No effort put in chicken curry.

Final verdict?
If ambience is not an issue and you want to grab quick snack or couple of beers, this place is Yes!
If want proper ambience for cosy gathering or family time, this place is No!

The place is good and decent. It's nothing special but good enough for a casual hangout between friends. The food items labelled as Timmure are delicious but you definitely need to drink to wash away the strong taste of Timur. The best time to visit this place is at 6 pm.
The restaurant, located in Mid Baneshwor, offers decent and affordable food. The ambience is okay, and when we visited in the mid-afternoon, it was quite empty.

I recently visited Food Hub by H2O with my friends to celebrate a birthday, and overall it was a great experience. The food was delicious and everyone really enjoyed it, though the service was a bit slow as it took time for our order to arrive. We also spent an hour in the karaoke section, which was a lot of fun and made the celebration even more special, making it a nice place to hang out with friends despite the slight delay in service.

I along with my friend recently visited this place and had such a great experience. The food was incredibly flavorful and beautifully presented - every dish felt thoughtfully made. The ambiance is warm, cozy, and definitely adds to the overall vibe.
I love the club sandwich here. Their Nasi-Goreng is also really good. It’s a good place to hangout with a group. They have karaoke rooms too. Would recommend to go with friends.
Food was delicious. Their sandwich is also delicious. And loaded fries were yummy .

From the moment I walked into the food hub,I knew I was in for a treat. The atmosphere is cozy yet chic, making it the perfect spot to unwind and enjoy a fantastic meal. The real star, however, is the food. Each dish was beautifully presented and packed with flavors that left me coming back for more. But Pizza was average.

address: pink bridge, Bijuli bazar bridge, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Great tea, and good ambience. Yet to try some food, will definitely return for that in the future.

address: pink bridge, Bijuli bazar bridge, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Amazing experience! The food was flavorful, the service was impeccable, and the ambiance made it even more enjoyable. Highly recommend!

address: pink bridge, Bijuli bazar bridge, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: ♥️🍹🍷☕  we are ready to serve you a delicious authentic 🤤 food 🍚🌾 and drinks 🍻 🍸 enjoy the live match ✅ with #gaunghar

address: pink bridge, Bijuli bazar bridge, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Best place to visit 🥰 live match with beer 🍻😁

address: pink bridge, Bijuli bazar bridge, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Delicious 😋 yummy ❤️🍸🍷

This place is heaven for someone who truely loves food!!!
Their wings is top notch😍
I paticularly love their garlic parmesan sauce and it really never enough for me!
Their chicken momo is also absolutely amazing! Worth a try for sure!
Recently I tried their Chicken 65 which is also one of the best I have had so far in the city!
Their service staffs are also very friendly with amazing hospitality. The mild songs they play also adds a lot of calmness while enjoying with friends!
Considering the food and ambience, I think this place is totally value for money and I definitely would recommend everyone to try their food!
Sometimes you also meet the owners who are definitely the most humble people running a restaurant and you would love having conversation with them
Overall I would visit this place again and again particularly for their food😍

The only downside would be the lack of parking space for 4 wheelers!  There is space only for a couple of cars! I hope they sort out parking problem sooner so that more people could enjoy their delicious food!

Booked a table over the phone but the staff only acknowledged it and didn’t actually reserve the table. Somehow managed to get a seat. The food was good, especially the Garlic Parmesan Sauce and Akabare Mango. Chicken Sekuwa was below average it wasn’t chewy enough, overcooked and the veg fried rice was bland.

Loved the food. The variety in wings is just right. They have an open seating as well as private seating. Service staff were very good and friendly. Parking for cars can be an issue. Bike parking is okay. Restroom situation is a concern.
But definitely visiting again for the food.

Wings, their signature dish, is best served with akabare mango sauce. Foods were yum, served well, and hygienic too.
And no, it didn’t give me food poisoning (reference to earlier review, everyone may have their own immune system).

Only thing that could be better is their sitting area. Place feels dull, maybe better lighting needed and/or good music.

Overall, service is good, food is good, location is good, pricing is okayish, aesthetic be improved.

Their service is always on the top. Very patience staffs. I tried every wings there. My fav is red hot spicy. I go there every now and then.  Also lately wings taste too sweet . May b its a sauce but please correct it. Otherwise it’s a good place to eat wings.

I visited House of Thakali while I was in Nepal for a holiday. The ambiance, the professionalism of the staff, and the food ,everything was just perfect. We visited the place three times during my 15-day stay in Kathmandu.
A special mention to their staff member, Aakash,he was sweet, polite, and very professional. I will definitely visit again when I return to Nepal next year. What a place, what amazing food absolutely loved it!

Great food with truly authentic flavors , the kanchamba was on point and the thakali set was delicious. The place is clean, aesthetically pleasing, and has a warm, welcoming vibe. The staff were very friendly and supportive; even when we accidentally made a mess, they quickly cleaned it up without any hesitation and reassured us. Definitely a restaurant worth visiting!

Dining at House of Thakali was a wonderful experience. The staff were friendly and attentive, making the atmosphere warm and welcoming. The restaurant is clean, well-organized, and has a traditional Nepali vibe that makes it comfortable for both casual meals and family gatherings.

The food is the main highlight. The traditional Thakali set meals are flavorful and well-prepared, with fresh dal, rice, tarkari, and pickles. Each dish tastes authentic, and the quality of ingredients is noticeable. The portions are generous, and prices are reasonable.

Service is prompt and courteous, with staff ensuring a comfortable dining experience. Overall, House of Thakali is a great place to enjoy genuine Nepali cuisine in a clean, cozy, and culturally rich setting. Highly recommended for both locals and visitors.

The service was amazing.
All the side dishes were done just right.
The staff come and check you every often and very attentive.

wonderful staff and you can find very authentic taste of thakali food here ..probably the best thakali set we ever had .
my wife she ordered veg paneer and i had chicken one
..The chicken was very flavourful and tender ..

the price was a little high but its very hard to find quality of food and service in the street of kathmandu .

we will see again soon ❤️

The place feels really great. The view you get in a bright day is amazing.

I tried a Thali which was great, save for rice which was below par. The Mutton (chyangra) was great along with all other items.

Service could have been much swift and hospitable.

While the ambience is exceptional, the overall value for money is lacking. The pizza was underwhelming, and the coffee was served cold. Service was a mixed bag, while some staff members were capable, others were unprofessional. It’s a lovely spot for a drink to enjoy the view, but I cannot recommend it as a dining destination based on this experience.

I just felt this place is just for clicking the pictures in the stairs as the foods are not as it's taste as per it's prices. The pricing is high but the taste is not good.
The worst one is the pizza here, priced high, taste none.

The best part of this place has to be its ambience an architectural dream with a round staircase and a stunning 360-degree view of the valley. The space feels well maintained and thoughtfully designed.

However, being located right by one of the busiest roads in town, the constant noise of vehicles and honking does creep into the dining experience.

We tried the platter and paneer mo:mo, both of which were flavorful and enjoyable. The service, on the other hand, could use some improvement it felt a bit off and, at times, slightly rude.

Would recommend getting a reservation beforehand as well!

I have been working in the F&B hospitality industry for 11 years, and I have never experienced this kind of service. We ordered an Americano coffee, but it was served cold.
As someone from the industry, I understand that mistakes can happen, but serving a hot beverage cold without checking quality is disappointing. I hope the restaurant pays more attention to basic service standards and quality control in the future.

We saw promotion for lunch menu but sadly it was not available for that day. We order their momo combo. Surprisingly  everything was nice instead of Momo. Some staff were a little rude but others were nice . We were the only customer but we were getting ignored. Hope it will not happen again .
Overall it was nice .

I really loved this place
The food here was very delicious. I ate pizza, momos, and coffee (cappuccino) I liked everything but the Hot Lemon with Honey was the best for me 😍
The staff were very good and helpful. They took great care of me and brought all the orders on time.Ambiance also felt peaceful and enjoyable.
I will definitely come here again 👌Thank you for everything 🤗

I came this place very first time but i felt like i came before many more times that resturants staffs are very friendly and we taste a lot of foods and are also super delicious .
I love this place preety much that definitely i will come again .
Of course , i will recommend to all who are seeking for good restaurant in baneshwor area.

thank you so much for everything .

The experience overall was amazing, we loved the food, the experience, and the service. The food was mouth watering, and look appealing too. Came out really quick, and so so yummy. The staff was really friendly, loved being there. Loved the songs too haha. Very well recommend and will come back again.

I really loved this place
The food here was very delicious. I ate momos, and coffee (cappuccino), and I liked everything
The staff were very good and helpful. They took great care of me and brought all the orders on time.Ambiance also felt peaceful and enjoyable.
I will definitely come here again 👌Thank you for everything 🤗Jigri sekuwa shantinagr Partap Tq bro l for great service
Best place to hang out with friends and peaceful environment with good ambience and service. Foods are also ao affordable and taste wise so good. Perfect place for chilling.

Looking for a cozy space to chill with your friend? If yes, look no further. This space is simple and cozy...welcoming in its own way. The say a bit conjusted but nonetheless relaxing. The menu limited yet reasonably priced. The aloo paratha had a good flavor and portion while the chiya too was delicious. The chau chau sadheko extremely flavorful as well.

This place is super nice and aesthetically beautiful. You can obviously visit here if you want a quick bite . You can also enjoy the atmosphere and work or talk for as long as you like. I was with one of my friend and I overstayed a little. It was for about 6 hours maybe. The Vive is super good over there and I guarantee that you will boost your mood for sure
If you are looking for a good cafe with various of food and drink options Mantra cafe is for you.

A wonderful café with a warm and inviting vibe. The tea is amazing and flavorful, the food is fresh, and the staff are very welcoming. A great place to spend time with friends or even work peacefully.

This restaurant boasts a variety of dishes, with momo, burgers, and sandwiches as their signature offerings. The amazing ambiance features a bar, garden, and spacious halls. Their drinks menu, including alcoholic beverages, juice, and coffee, is equally impressive.

This place has got lot of spaces with multiple halls and outdoor tables as well. This place is owned by Yala Durbar. The food is good and the service is also fast. We went for dinner and ordered fish and chips, Hawaiian pizza and crispy chicken. The pizza was good with classic Hawaiian taste. However, the fish and chips was not proper but something like fish finger. The crispy chicken was ok. Nice place and good food. The location is also easy to get to this place.
Good ambience to stay and very friendly people serving delicious food. Nice space for kids too. Its always nice experience till now. ❤
Everything that we ordered was absolutely delicious, the service was fast and efficient. Such a lovely ambiance with outdoor and indoor sitting.

Overall , the service was good and so was the food

The interior is pleasing with nice songs and Perfecto interior ( newari style windows)

Washroom was pretty hygienic ~

Located at old Baneshwor on the way to New Baneshwor road. Restaurant name is changed now as Crunchy Corner. Quite a good place with Good Food. There's also a playing place for kids so kids will definitely enjoy. Parking will be a problem as there is not enough space available.

This can be the best place for kids as its named as wonderland, with different games tools and beautiful paintings with information it has decorated uts premise. live music is good as well as the place is neat and clean. services is not so good.
Nice place to be with young kids.. good food and exciting n safe play area for kids.. decent parking space too..
Good place to hang out with friends and family... building is made by earthquake resistant material.. good playing area for children. And in the evening good live music by local live singers..
Food was nice and also place was quiet and very calm. Good place for family and friends
Spacious.. Good Food..
Good food and Manager is very professional

My partner loves Korean cuisine or more like love 'Soul' so had to try out this new branch they opened in Baneshwor. Honestly, Food and Service was good and not great. Loved the freshness and taste but did not quite liked the way they present Rabokki. I would have liked it if it was more about the customers cooking rather that half the food being pre-cooked and served with raw noodles.

I have visited soul cafe , lazimpat many times and I wanted to try there new place "atsoul" which didn't disappoint🤞🏻 cheeseball and fries were different but tasty at the same time 😽really loved the rabooki ✨some dishes on the menu were not available at the moment 🥺the service was very nice 💗the place was very clean and picture worthy. The main highlight of dish was 🍱 bento box which was worth every penny 💰 will surely visit for the bento box 👣

The food is bit on the expensive side but overall the ambience of the place is very nice and peaceful, truly no crowd at all. The service is a bit all over the place as no server is behind the counter/reception or to receive or take order. Tbh would be a go to place from time to time as the food is quite good. I tried their non-veg soul bento box and it was quite a good deal.

really good food and vibes.
especially their sharing platter is affordable based on the portion that they serve. and the mocktails, you gotta try high pau one and fruit punch, really good
Such a pretty cafe.It’s vibrant ,bright, airy and peaceful. They have ample seating space with both indoor and outdoor seating arrangement .

Highly recommend Roadhouse! My thin crust pizza and potato skins were excellent - the food tasted fantastic. The ambiance is great, and our server, Dev, provided good, attentive service. My only minor feedback is the A/C could be set a bit cooler. Overall, a genuinely pleasant experience!
The pizza was absolutely delightful, loved every bite of it. The service honestly wasn't the best that day but I hope it's improved now.

Overall, a nice experience.
Went there with my family. The service was swift, though some of the orders took a bit more time.
The food was great. Loved the pizzas and potato wedges.
The ambiance is pretty good. Not astonishing.  I think the ceiling needs some work, the bare concrete didn't appease me. Lighting is okay.
Th price is obviously steep, but I think it's justified to some extent.

The pizza I ate was quite good, tho the crust was a little thick. The lasagna was very creamy and a little burnt. The ambience was quite nice.
The server Mr Dinesh provide us with good service

very bad experience. i ordered farmhouse pizza w/ extra cheese worth Rs. 1285/-. the crust was totally burned. cheese and extra cheese had no stretch. mix vegetable taste was totally burnt, Overall the taste was awefull. i ordered it for my wife and she is still upset.

Usually went there for khana set. Had coffee and burger today. Wasn't expected coffee to be good and strong. Its actually good than some well established cafè. Burger too was well made. Place is beautiful, cozy and has good ambience. Staffs were friendly. Recommended.

I had a very disappointing experience here. I ordered Fish Tawa, but what I was served was clearly deep-fried in oil, not tawa-fried at all, as anyone with basic food knowledge. When I raised this issue, the server didn’t seem bothered in the slightest—no apology, no effort to fix it, nothing.

The food quality was poor, the service was worse, and overall it felt like a complete waste of money. If you actually have taste buds and expect decent service, I would strongly suggest avoiding this place. Worst food and service experience I’ve had in a long time.

This restaurant is located near Sankhamul Pul and offers delicious food along with excellent service. The staff are quick, attentive, and make the dining experience very smooth. There are private cabin seating options, as well as balcony and rooftop areas that provide a pleasant atmosphere for guests. Parking is also available, making it convenient for visitors. Overall, a great spot to enjoy good food in a comfortable setting.

Excellent place with great ambience and good food quality.

The parking space is good and the venue is spacious. The staff is friendly and food tastes Better.

If you are looking for delicious food in a quiet environment, then this is the place for you. It is perfect for partners, friends, and family. We visited for lunch and had the Thakali set. The staff is very friendly and provides quality service. While Bardali is a bit expensive, the taste of the food is awesome.
Beautiful atmosphere restaurant in baneshwor area. I have visited here many times with my friends and colleagues. Food was so tasty. Excellent customer service. prefer to visit again. Thanks

Delicious food and service
Polite server and take less time for food preparation
Pizza and chicken biryani are really flavourful and tempting
Environment is also really good specifically the rooftop has good view
Best place for refreshments and entertainment in trem of food is best in quality and quantity
Best place to hang out with friends and good food.
Please check before takeaway I got wrong order and had to come back for right order.

It was my favorite place to eat thakali their chicken gravy set was so delicious but last time when I went with my brothers it was around 650 per person for chicken thakali and they haven’t upgraded their price menu also so that was quite shocking as well we waited for printed bill but they didn’t bring so we went home . Total was Rs 1959 .
Nice ambience and food, but the price is on the upper end. Service was not bad. So would recommend this place.
Really really loved the food over here 😁😋 very tasty and the place is also nice 💗 staffs are very friendly and cooperative ✨💕
Enjoy the Thakali cuisine. The only drawnack of the dining was; the meal set not served in Jharke thaal which is the tradition of Thakali. Rest is fine 👍️

Ordered Thali set and it came with undercooked, over-salted meat.  Completely ruined the entire plate. Masu ta khana nasakine type ko thiyo. We politely told the staff they didn't respond to our feedback. It used to be my fav place. Nepali thali without Nepali hospitality. NO RESPONSE NO APOLGY.. Impressive VERY GOOD SERVICE keep going like this you guys are doing great job. Price range is too high for what???? Attitude with no respect to customer?? I don't know why they charge like this if they don't serve good food.. matlabai bhayena ni...Dhanyabaad..

The location of this place is good as we can seen the Baneswor area and the mountains (if the sky is clear). Speaking of the foods, The chicken wings were pretty good. But, the Cafe Latte hasn't have that taste. Even the potato wedges could have been better.

From all of the dishes we ordered , almost most of it tasted good but there’s a room for improvement i.e. the dippings . Otherwise they were alright. However the fish tempura wasn’t tasty . They took a good one and a half hour to serve this dish . It was smelly and didn’t have a good taste . For the drinks - iced latte and blended mocha were great but the lemon ice tea was mehh. The serving time was sort of a slow though .
Talking about the space, it is subtle and pleasant and the view that you can catch from this place -be it at night or at the noon; its spectacular. And the staffs were pretty attentive and good.
Overall, the place is nice.
The service was fast but the taste dhwosta . Drink pani namitho. The picture is terrace style potato wegde  they served. Meat platter was good.

With an awesome view of the new baneswor you can definitely enjoy their food. There is a slight delay in coming food but you can enjoy the view in those times 😉. Chicken 🍗 was best and there combo meal was just best. And you can definitely try their coffee as well as watching the awesome view 😉. Been there more than a couple of times I just love this place.Definetly go place for everyone ✌️😁

This place is located at Baneshwor chowk. The view from this place is awesome especially in the evening. We visited this place a month back and being a newly opened place there was limited menu. The place is comparatively small but comfortable. The ambience is good. The staffs were professional. The food was ok. We had some confusion on entering the place as well. Improvements are required and hope they will consider all these feedback. Hope to visit this place after some months to see the changes!!

Nice little restro in Mid Baneswor Area.
Reasonable Pricing.
Ample Parking Space.

Foodwise- an average affair.

PONG restaurant offers a good overall service with a pleasant atmosphere. However, there's room for improvement in food procing, especially for the fast food items. Overall, its good place for satisfying dining experience! 🥂🙌
#foodresturantinkathmandu

I’ve been a regular customer since this restaurant opened, but I’m very disappointed with how the food quality and taste have declined over time. While the service is still good, the staff is friendly, and parking is convenient, the seating isn’t very comfortable. I strongly urge the management to re-evaluate the food quality, as it no longer meets expectations.

Has Parking. Huge plus!

Menu is big, but I asked for a few things and none were available. A lot to work on the food.

The manager literally sent the waiter lady on road to ask us to return back and show payment screenshot which was already verified by the person who billed us.

It was embarrassing! The manager didn’t want to check their portal, didn’t want the waiter lady to check herself, didn’t want to come outside, but ask a guest to return from the road.

I hope they work on this and realize the importance of not bothering guests who’ve already left without verifying first.
Nice location, lovely food and respectful staffs. Loved being here
The atmosphere here is lovely to see the views of planes take off and land is amazing
One of the best place to eat in with an absolute stunning view in Baneshwor.Wat a Gem 💎!!! Chilled beers and good views.
Hideaway restaurant has a good location from which almost entire Kathmandu can be seen in 360 degree. Food and service are average. No parking was available for car but enough for bike and scooters.

Value for money.
You get to see a great view from the top and a lovely ambience inside.

This place has an amazing view as its located on the top floor. You can get an amazing view of the valley either your food. Good menu looks good, hookah was good too. Staffs were friendly too. Overall the experience was amazing.
Great local food, fresh and tasty. Clean place and friendly service. Highly recommended!
"Attentive staff with great hospitality. The food was delicious with a variety of options, and the place was clean and well-maintained. Highly recommended!"
Good service, affordable price, good food...
Delicious food at a very reasonable price 👌

A perfect place to hangout with friends. Food is delicious, environment is perfect but you have to wait longer than usual here to get your order. (I along with my friends had to wait for nearly one hour to get our order but the staff are really polite so that compensate this)

address: Opposite of Prime Times Television, Chowk Katyani Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: It was nice visiting there in the evening .The service was very good and surprisingly fast. The management staff were very polite and welcoming. I tried the chatpate and the taste was really good fresh and flavorful. I also had masala tea, which was excellent and perfectly made.

address: Opposite of Prime Times Television, Chowk Katyani Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
An exceptionally well-curated café offering a serene, impeccably maintained ambience that ensures a comfortable and restorative dining experience. The Masala Milk Tea was outstanding richly aromatic and perfectly balanced, making it highly commendable. The Buffalo Wings were expertly prepared with a crisp exterior and succulent interior, while the Mixed Thukpa impressed with its robust, comforting broth and fresh, well-integrated ingredients.
The interior design, seating arrangement, and lighting were thoughtfully structured to create a tranquil yet functional environment suitable for study, casual meetings, or relaxed social gatherings. High standards of cleanliness and efficient service were evident throughout. Overall, the café presents an excellent blend of refined beverages, consistent culinary quality, and atmospheric sophistication, making it a highly recommendable destination for those seeking comfort and quality in a refined setting. ☕✨

address: Opposite of Prime Times Television, Chowk Katyani Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: This cafe is a true sanctuary for tea lovers. The ambiance is perfectly serene—ideal for a quiet escape or a thoughtful conversation. The tea service is exceptional, with high-quality loose leaves brewed to precision and served with care. Combined with the warm, attentive staff, it offers a refined and relaxing experience that is hard to find elsewhere. Highly recommended.

address: Opposite of Prime Times Television, Chowk Katyani Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: The food here is incredible! Tried the chicken chilly and buff chilly — both were full of flavor. Great presentation and clean environment. Will surely visit again.

address: Opposite of Prime Times Television, Chowk Katyani Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
Loved my time at Jampauroti Café! The food is really tasty and feels fresh every time. The service is friendly and quick, and the staff make you feel comfortable right away.

The atmosphere is super chill and cozy—perfect for hanging out or just relaxing with good food. Definitely a place I’d keep coming back to. Highly recommended! 😊

address: M8VP+FH5, Nava Srijana Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Taste of food is good but took 45 mins to serve the food. Recommended to try fresh Korean food in reasonable price.

address: M8VP+FH5, Nava Srijana Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
Small cozy place with tea, coffee ,momo, and noodles.
Taste wise, the place is not that bad. But i am not highly recommending for momo. Coffee and teas are also average. However, hospitality is very good and the staff are very friendly.
Update: Now the place also offers kimbim baaps, kimchi and some korean items too. They also serve thai noodles salads.

address: M8VP+FH5, Nava Srijana Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Cute, clean place with decent food and nice people. They said their menu is a bit limited since they reopened post lockdown but they've got a good number of items for small cafe. The dan dan noodles, truthfully, aren't as good as some other places in town, but not bad. Their hakka noodles are actually better.

address: M8VP+FH5, Nava Srijana Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: I ordered bibimbap from here and the rice was so watery it ruined the food for me

address: M8VP+FH5, Nava Srijana Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
ordered online from pathao yesterday ….and such a homemade taste and quality, made me order once again today. so much food for such a low price.

tbh its not fancy food..everything is simple, fresh ingredients, good taste, worth every Rs! i could eat their food everyday! also the shya phaley was loaded with meat.

Carnival Restro and Meeting in Thapagaun, Anamnagar, Kathmandu is the perfect spot for small parties, meetings, and gatherings. The food is great, the ambiance is cozy, and they have ample parking for cars and bikes. One of the best cafes in Kathmandu - highly recommended!

Located nearby Anamnagar Bridge, carnival restro is a great place for food and drinks. Just happened to be there for a program and the place was really nice. They also have a training hall with sufficient parking spaces. The food and drinks here is good. They have fruits grown around the premises as well. Enjoyed being here for a day. The decorations of the area is good. They also have outdoor seating arrangements. Overall it was nice. The coffee was also good. Hope to be back soon!

Highly recommendable resort harness zipline adventure resort.

Excellent place to stay. Rooms were very clean and modern. Great breakfast as well.

I have been here multiple times with friends and family for lunch, workshop, meeting and annual functions.
I really enjoyed the food and was a little bit disappointed due to the little slow service. But I found the halls are comfortable for meeting and workshop.

Nice space with adequate parking facilities available, they have well maintained open seatings which allows pleasant atmosphere for dining, they also have a bar which can act as a spot to enjoy some quality drinks.. One can opt for evening coffee or a few pegs as per convenience, their service wont disappoint.

ordered a chicken platter for rs 999
we were told that we would get a beer complimentary with that platter but during billing, the bill was of rs 1399 since we chose to have beer too
also, the chicken in the platter was not so fresh

we ordered tandoori chicken wings, momo and dragon chicken and they all were really good. the portion were good enough, the taste was actually great. however the chicken wings were very small in size. the ambience was really appealing, clean. they also live screen worldcup every day so thats a plus if you want to enjoy food and football.
overall 8.5/10. totally recomended

We ordered takeout for a family event. Unfortunately, the mixed vegetables were stale and had a noticeable rotten smell. The fried vegetable appetizer seemed to have been fried straight from frozen, as the vegetables were still stuck together. The matar paneer was bland and had a thin, watery curry instead of the usual thick gravy.

Stepping into **The Grillfather** restaurant is like entering a realm where culinary excellence meets impeccable cleanliness and a vibrant ambiance. The moment you walk in, you're greeted by an atmosphere that exudes sophistication and comfort, setting the stage for an unforgettable dining experience. The cleanliness of the establishment is evident in every corner, reassuring patrons that their meal is prepared in a pristine environment.

The food, oh the food! It's nothing short of fantastic. Each dish is a masterpiece, crafted with the finest ingredients and presented with the utmost care. The flavors are bold and memorable, leaving your taste buds yearning for more. From the succulent steaks to the perfectly grilled delicacies, every item on the menu is a testament to the restaurant's commitment to gastronomic brilliance.

Yes, the prices may be on the higher side, but rest assured, it is a price worth paying. The value you receive in return – the sumptuous food, the pristine setting, and the overall experience – is unparalleled. The Grillfather isn't just a restaurant; it's a culinary journey that's absolutely worth every penny. Whether it's a special occasion or a treat to oneself, dining here is an investment in pleasure and satisfaction. So, if you're looking for a place that promises and delivers excellence on all fronts, The Grillfather is the destination to choose.
The food is great here. I ordered chicken and pork sekuwa and both were really good. Also it's a good place to enjoy live sports. I would visit this place again and recommend to everyone.
Coriander Restaurant serves up incredibly tasty Indian cuisine with a variety of flavorful dishes.
Order white sauce pasta but got red sauce instead

I wold like to thans Sushila & team (Bijay,Mitesh,Ashmita,Karan ) whonis behave like a family and ifnyou want anything just contact Mis. Sushila. She is very friendly , even she is always with you to help in any terms.

Again I want to thank , personally Mis. Shisils whonis ver8ngriendly and she taking care of all tourist as a family member .
I request  everyone  to visit  here  once to get refreshment from your  busy life

Great Food, Friendly Atmosphere

Enjoyed a fantastic meal in a welcoming setting. The food was delicious, and the staff made the experience even better with their friendly service. Highly recommend!

address: M8VJ+2WC, Lakhe Chaur Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Worth the food and ambience. Best spot for celebrating family and friends get together. A sweet corner to escape in heart of our Kathmandu city.

address: M8VJ+2WC, Lakhe Chaur Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Great place to chill out with friends & family with a nice ambiance &  delicious food.Staff were friendly & will serve various dishes as per consumer choice with greatest hospitality.Apart from that the service is slow & quite expensive too.Thank you

address: M8VJ+2WC, Lakhe Chaur Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: The place,food and atmosphere were very good.🫰

Beer on MRP.
Varieties of Barhasinghe Beer.
Value for Money.
The Ambiance is good too.
The Staffs are polite and tend to the guests.
Nice little place off the grid.

address: M8VJ+2WC, Lakhe Chaur Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
**5/5 Stars – A Hidden Gem That Nails It!

Just had one of the best meals in a long time and I’m still feeling the taste of it. The paneer tikka dry was hands-down phenomenal,  Easily the best I’ve had in the city. German vibes with yummy and amazing choices of assortment they got. Loved it

The choice of music deserves a special mention – chill indie beats mixed with some retro Bollywood remixes that somehow worked perfectly. Not too loud, just the right vibe for a relaxed yet upbeat evening.

Also ask for fusion cocktails, the guy agreed to prepare something new and unique. And it turn out truly awesome. They really know what their customers like.

Service was warm, attentive without being overbearing, and the ambiance is cozy-modern with just the right lighting.

If you love bold Indian flavors with a twist, great drinks, and a vibe – I recommend this place. I am reserving my tables here for my every next visit to Kathmandu.

Cityscape Legacy & Bar:
More classy and chill atmosphere, good for relaxed hangouts.⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐
Nice place with awesome view . Also the nachos was one of the tastiest items out there.
Perfect place in new baneshwor to hangout .
Best place to chill with friends
I had keema noodles and milk tea. Tea was absolutely great but we can work a bit on keema noodles. It could be more juicy.

Very nice cafe around the area of anamnagar. Rates are reasonable and affordable. You can get a variety of items on the menu.  Most of the items are tasty. The atmosphere is good , a very nice place to go on a date or with family to enjoy the time . You can visit if you are near that area.
This place has become my second home! The staff is incredibly welcoming, and they remember my usual order, which makes every visit feel personal.
I had an interesting service. Its was one of the best service ever i had in my life. They speaks politely. The food was delicious especially "keema noodle".... You'll have an pleasent surprise...
Good place to have tea and worthy Keenan noodle
Good place and great food. Recommended.
Ordered momo platter through pathao .. and the items were spilled and all messed up ... for proof I clicked the picture right away. I don't know what should I be doing with this mess..
Food here is too good. Not sure about Pork sekuwa but normal dishes made from kitchen is delicious! 🤤🤤

This restaurant is conveniently located near our office, and the food tastes good. However, last week, I went there with seven of my colleagues, and we had a poor experience. Some of our staff called ahead to order two servings of jhol momo, expecting them to be ready when they arrived. Later, five more of us joined, and upon arriving, we explained to a staff member that we had already ordered two momos over the phone and now wanted to add one more, making a total of three. We also placed additional orders.

However, they misunderstood and brought out four momos. When we asked them to take one back, instead of acknowledging the mistake, three different staff members repeatedly approached our table, blaming us for the confusion. We requested that they let us finish our meal, but they kept coming over, and one even claimed to be the manager. Another staff member rudely told us not to return. It was shocking to encounter such poor hospitality—how can people with such behavior work in the service industry? If you care about customer service, avoid this restaurant.
Cheap and best for gathering

Its entrance is exactly inside the water tank (pani tanky). It has parking space for both two and four wheelers which is convenient for customers. The restaurant is on the top floor with indoor and outdoor seating. Most of the dishes (main course and spaghetti) were delicious but in the pizza the crust at the end was quite hard, which could be an area of improvement. The service was good and well managed. Wifi available but was slow. The atmosphere was okay.
Location is great. But food is average. service need to be improved. They need training. We ordered 'Biryani' but later they canceled. Overall great place but need much more improvement.

The environment and the view is nice. Waiters are not on time. I gave order for less spicy but the food was spicy. Waiters must come often after giving food and drinks to ask if we need something but they didn't come. I called and request for bill. I suggest to have wifi QR code on the table or in written form with Menu.
Loft Lounge and Bar offers a chic, cozy atmosphere with a fantastic environment and average selection on foods. The service is top-notch, making it a perfect spot for a night out.
Poor food mostly junk type, poor service. Great location and rooftop views. Wish they could make it better place...

It was a long time since I revisited the place. Security guard at gate was busy on his phone hence ignored our horn to assist for parking. We used to love their Momo but this time Momo was juicy but something was lacking, sauce needs definite improvement. Chicken Sekuwa was not juicy but bit dry & was below average. Fresh lemon soda was good. Price was at higher side & with added VAT it climbed up!

Stepping into Bakery Cafe New Baneswor is an instant mood booster. While the nice ambiance provides a comfortable and welcoming backdrop for any casual outing, what truly sets this cafe apart is its exceptional service team.
​The service staff here are truly special. The team communicates using sign language, and the experience of interacting with them is nothing short of delightful. Any initial concerns about communication quickly melted away; in fact, the entire process was seamless and cheerful. The staff members are incredibly happy, constantly smiling, and their positive energy is absolutely infectious—they genuinely made us smile right back! It was a powerful reminder that warmth and happiness transcend spoken words. This high-touch, thoughtful service made the entire visit memorable.
​Beyond the unique interactions, the fundamentals are solid too. The food is good, making it a perfect spot for a quick snack or a leisurely coffee break. Combined with the pleasant setting, Bakery Cafe New Baneswor offers much more than just good food and drink—it offers a truly positive human experience.
​I highly recommend visiting this cafe for the great service, cheerful staff, and solid offerings.
Good food, great service, and an unforgettable, uplifting atmosphere.
A nice cafe to spend sometime with friends. We ordered jhol momo and pan fried momo. Both were good. Service is very good.

Will always remain one of the best place to go out to eat while in Kathmandu. It’s decent, not so pricey, centrally located and above all they serve as an role model amongst many restaurants as it’s mainly run by people living with some form of disability (primarily those not able to hear or speak) and in some way it teaches us the value of sign language. Highly recommended.

Always enjoyed the food over here. The momo was good but the sauce needs improvements. Maybe add spicy and other options like peanut mixed ones. The pizza offered here is a treat, amazing flavors and a fluffy dough.

We went there after I saw tons of reviews from influencers in tiktok and instagram,promoting Dharane style Thukpa.But we were so disappointed with the food.Talking about Thukpa,it looked nice but when it came to taste,it was less than basic.The broth of thukpa was watery with few pieces(less than 5-6,see in pic) of chicken,the noodles were overcooked,it had no salt at all.
