Loved the vibe here, the ambience is warm and inviting. The food easily lives up to it too. The fries were absolutely loaded and satisfying, and the burger hit the spot. Simple, tasty, and worth coming back for. Recommended.

Went to T’s Your Palate and honestly, the food was amazing! The burgers were super tasty and the ambiance was really nice and cozy. The only downside was that it took quite a while for the staff to notice us and take our order. Other than that, everything was great. I will definitely visit again!

i went here for the first time.the taste of the burger was good but with that price, the burger was a bit small. and the nachos? we heard a great deal about nachos from here but we were utterly disappointed. i’ve never tried nachos this plain in my life. it was tasteless. we had high hopes : (

The name "Newa Lahana" is being misused badly here. The pricing is excessively high compared to the original franchise, and nothing about the food or service justifies it. We ordered chicken samayabaji set(rs. 470). From the set were served chhoila with three large bones along with only one tiny piece of meat — completely unacceptable for a dish that's supposed to be meat-focused. The beaten rice (chiura) was mostly powder, covered in its own dust. Overall, extremely overpriced food with no satisfaction in taste or service. Definitely not worth the money. After visit only i checked the reviews and it’s amazingly negative 😆 NOT RECOMMEND AT ALL!!!

Be aware they hide reviews!!!! Mero pani hide gareko chha so editing and posting again!!!!

If you're looking for local newari food around Kathmandu valley Newa Lahana can be best. Ambience was so amazing with local mat style as well as comforatable sofa. Food was very good ans as well as service too. I had great time here with quality and good food with peaceful and calm atmosphere. And they have coupn of 20% on your next visit. So, I would suggest you all to visit there once and have good experience.
Didn’t live upto its name. Went on Friday afternoon for lunch but the food was not fresh except bara. Choila had weird smell and taste. Need to improve a lot.

Authentic Newari cuisine in the heart of Kathmandu, Newa Lahana Kamaladi is a must-visit. The ambiance beautifully reflects Newar culture, with traditional seating and warm hospitality that makes you feel at home. The staff were polite and helpful. Food came in reasonable time even though it was a busy hour.
Perfect place to have authentic newari cuisine. It reflects the newari food and culture. Must visit places if you love newari food.

Such a beautiful place in Kathmandu.
The food is really good, fresh, and well-served. The rooftop ambience is amazing full of lights, plants, and peaceful vibes. It’s a perfect spot to chill with your besties or hang out with a gang. 😝
One of the best things is the view you can literally see Kathmandu from every corner, especially in the evening. The atmosphere feels calm yet lively, great for conversations, photos, and relaxing after a long day.🙌
Staff are friendly, and the place feels warm and welcoming.
Highly recommended for good food, great vibes, and memorable time. Will definitely visit again. 🌿✨

“From the moment we walked in, we were enveloped by the soothing music and the warm glow of the lights. The perfect spot to unwind after a long day!”Absolutely stunning views! This rooftop spot is the perfect place to unwind with a cocktail. The atmosphere is upscale yet relaxed, making it ideal for date night or catching up with friends. The service was impeccable, and the cocktails were expertly crafted. A must-visit in the city!"

Loved this beautiful  restaurant.  The veggie  burger and cocoa- cola we had was what just hit the spot. The staff oh,  they were the best! Atmosphere is phenomenal with an indoor stairwell you are treated to beautiful paintings on the wall and live plants among aquarium on each level. This lead to a colorful display of prayerflags which added to flavor of to you senses while looking out over katmandu on a beautiful starry night adding a touch of romance to this captivating city.
Cannot  wait to return to katmandu and to frequent this restaurant again. It was a special  treat to visit
Good food with a nice ambience. The pool table is a plus and the place attracts a lot of backpackers. Prices are quite affordable compared to other spots.

The establishment offers a comfortable atmosphere, featuring well-appointed rooms. Guests are greeted by aquatic-themed decor and artwork in the corridors. The upper level provides access to a public snooker area, where individuals from diverse backgrounds gather, enjoying music and camaraderie while overlooking a scenic valley vista.
Plus magic happens here!

restaurant_name: Hunger End Thakali Kitchen and Rooftop Restaurant
review_text: Very nice food both in price and taste. The waitress in the restaurant does not speak English fluently but she will try her best. Even though it is a rooftop restaurant, I strongly recommends against sitting outside as it is near the busy street and the building is not high; therefore very dusty outside and you can smell gasoline.

restaurant_name: Hunger End Thakali Kitchen and Rooftop Restaurant
review_text: I frequently visit Hunger end and when i visit here my hunger really ends. Affordable price for food and quick service. Sometimes late when a-bit pack but worthy waiting. Taste never disappoints.

restaurant_name: Hunger End Thakali Kitchen and Rooftop Restaurant
review_text: Finally completed my 5 plate of Thali and got 1 free. Just a best vibing and best place to relax at rooftop as well. Best place for Thakali Khana Set and especially Chicken. Went with family and the staff are so friendly as well. My only place for Thakali khana for my family and friends. Highly recommeded.

restaurant_name: Hunger End Thakali Kitchen and Rooftop Restaurant
review_text: I ordered a safe option of chow mein and a plain lassy. They managed to make chow mein incredibly spicy, no one checked on me, I didn’t have time, and had to eat it. The mouth is on fire and no enjoyment. The lassy had ice in it. I’m not sure how it is made, but again, super risky in the country with contaminated water supply. Overall, a very dissatisfying experience.

restaurant_name: Hunger End Thakali Kitchen and Rooftop Restaurant
review_text:
Came here for lunch and ordered Mutton Briyani, Mustang Aloo and Butter Chicken Masala pizza. All 3 were super delicious.
I imagine the atmosphere would be really nice to hangout in the evening too. Highly recommended 👌🏽

This is a great find in thamel, with great food and even better service. The food price is great considering the quality. We got the mutton thali and chicken chowmein. Everything in the thali was made to perfection, they were generous with reserves as well (we were super hungry after a shopping spree). The mutton was well cooked and flavourful. The chicken on the chowmein was a bit on the dry side, but the overall taste was great. The owner and servers are helpful and friendly, which made the overall experience even better.

Greenvilly was such a great find! I went there twice because the food was super delicious – I tried the Chowmein and the Momos, and both were really tasty. The atmosphere is nice and relaxed, and the owner is very friendly, which makes the whole experience even better. Definitely a place I’d recommend if you’re in Kathmandu and looking for good local food in a welcoming setting.

Ordered the plain porridge and chicken soup 💗 super comforting and honestly sooo good. Simple but full of flavour. Tried the thali rice set as well, and it was really nice and satisfying. If you’re in Kathmandu, I’d definitely recommend this place. Love from Malaysia 🇲🇾💛

Wow tried the egg noodle soup and the veggie chili momos and was so impressed with the flavour of these dishes. They were also presented well, generous sizes and had good service. Would highly recommend!
Fun local restaurant with very enthusiastic young man who runs around making sure everyone is happy. Tasty food, excellent prices and just a fun place to experience.

Walnut Bistro in Panipokhari, Kathmandu is a pleasant place known for its good food and relaxing ambience. One of the best parts of this restaurant is its outdoor seating area, which feels cozy and welcoming, especially in the evenings. The garden-style setup with tables and a fireplace creates a warm atmosphere, while the graffiti walls add a modern and artistic touch. Seating is well arranged and suitable for both small groups and bigger gatherings, making it a flexible option for casual dining or group meetups.

The highlight dish here is the Thakali rice set, which is even offered at a discounted price during afternoon hours, making it great value for money. The Thakali set is available in mutton, chicken, and vegetarian options and comes with a generous spread including rice, ghee, dal, papad, salad, saag, achar, custard, and seasonal vegetables. It is filling, balanced, and well prepared.

Apart from the Thakali set, there are several other dishes worth trying, such as momos, chowpsuey, chicken wings, garlic chicken, and jhol momo, all of which are flavorful and satisfying. The beverage menu is also quite good, with fresh juices, a variety of coffee, hot chocolate, and mocktails. For those who enjoy drinks, there is a good selection of beer and other alcoholic beverages as well.

Payments are convenient as they accept cash, cards, and FonePay, and VAT bills are provided. Overall, Walnut Bistro is a comfortable spot with good food, fair pricing, and a nice ambience in Panipokhari.

We came to this place after checking out from Nagarkot. We were hungry and expecting good food for lunch.
Walnut Bistro impressed us with good food. It was really tasty and we enjoyed a lot.
The atmosphere is also great with natural decoration and calm ambiance. They have a good space for car parking as well.
They have well behaved staff who served with care and Love. Mr Prakash served really well in my table. I will remember his hospitality.

The food was nice.. not as per the amount we pay but yass food was tasty
The service were great.. Very helpful staff and friendly
Since We went during cold days, so there was nothing much to cope with cold , only some fire for away from where we sat,
so you guys could work on that
Parking space was huge though some of your guards were rude to customer regarding parking

Had an amazing experience at Walnut Bistro! The ambiance is warm, peaceful, and beautifully designed with plenty of greenery that creates a relaxing atmosphere. The food was delicious, fresh, and full of flavor, with a menu that offers something for everyone. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel genuinely welcome throughout our visit.
What stood out the most was the combination of great food, excellent service, and a cozy environment that makes it perfect for family gatherings, casual meetups, or special occasions. The outdoor seating area adds an extra charm, making the dining experience even more enjoyable.
Highly recommended for anyone looking for a memorable dining experience in Kathmandu. Looking forward to visiting again soon!

Yummy food.
Nice friendly environment, polite and helpful servers, spacious, good parking space.

We came for the steak and ribs, and were not disappointed! Excellent taste, cooked well, juicy. Loved the potato and the seasoned veggies. Their live music was good. Not too loud. We could talk though we were right there. Great experience! Definitely recommend this place!

Had a great experience at Smoking Yak, Kathmandu! after a  trek. we just enjoyed it. The Nepali menu was full of authentic flavors and really well prepared. The burger was excellent and meat platter was just wow — juicy, flavourful, and perfectly cooked. Definitely a place worth visiting!

Came here for dinner with my wife and two boys. We're living in India so beef isn't something we can get easily so by the time we landed in Katmandu we were all gagging for a steak. We were not disappointed.

First and foremost the outside setting, staff and location make for a wonderful dining experience. Whether a family meal, hot date or celebration with friends this place can do it all.

We had the meat feast platter. 2 of them served 3 of us. Steak cooked beautifully and the pork chops were juicy. It also comes with bacon, eggs and sausages with vegetables and huge potato wedges all of which are delicious. My asian wife raved about the side sauces, I thought they were nice but she loved them. The stuffed chicken was the only thing that we could've done without. Knowing what I know now I would ask to swap the chicken for another pork chop. It's not bad just not as good as the other items on your plate.

Price wise for the quality you're getting it's spot on. The two mixed grills, a side order of fries, 3 cokes and a pint of local brew set us back $50. Mid range compared to other establishments but you know where the extra cost has gone and it's worth it.

🔥🔥🔥

Went here for lunch today.
Service was fantastic and food was superb.
Highly recommended if you come to Thamel.
Steak was perfectly cooked and the Peri-Peri burger was out of this world.
5 stars ⭐️

I had the steak, black burger, wings, and a beer — everything was excellent! The wings, especially, were outstanding. The atmosphere was amazing and the service was excellent from start to finish. Highly recommended!

address: Narayanhiti Palace Museum North Gate Rd, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: This place is just too good for the food and hospitality. Their kitchen is open concept to be transparent on their hygiene cooking. Variety of food and Yogurt is best after the meal. My favourite is their draft beer. I just cannot stop drinking even it is winter. Talking about people, they are very lovely and smiley faces. Mutton thali is must where you can get top up again. I will go again if visit KTM. Vinoliva La Vida

address: Narayanhiti Palace Museum North Gate Rd, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Vinoliva is my favorite spot Kathmandu. Whether you’re looking for a sophisticated date night, a high-end cocktail at the bar, or late night party with your friends/colleague/family this place delivers. The ambiance is chic yet cozy, and the service is seamless. The bartenders are true artists—the drinks were balanced and unique. It’s the kind of place where you can really lose track of time enjoying great conversation and even better food.

address: Narayanhiti Palace Museum North Gate Rd, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: This is a fantastic spot for an evening out with friends or family. The food is consistently delicious and the drinks are great. The atmosphere is lively and welcoming, and the live band was truly exceptional — they made the night even more enjoyable. The staff were attentive and friendly, providing great service from start to finish. Definitely a place I’d love to come back to!

address: Narayanhiti Palace Museum North Gate Rd, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
Vinoliva Restaurant & Bar is an absolute gem nestled in the heart of Kathmandu. From the moment you step inside, you're greeted with an inviting ambiance that sets the stage for a remarkable dining experience.

The quality of food here is truly exceptional. Each dish is crafted with care and expertise, showcasing the culinary mastery of the chefs. Whether you're craving traditional Nepali flavors or exploring international cuisines, Vinoliva has something to tantalize every palate. The freshness of ingredients and attention to detail shine through in every bite, making each dish a delightful culinary journey.

What sets Vinoliva apart is not just the delicious food, but also the warm hospitality and impeccable service. The staff members are attentive, knowledgeable, and always ready to cater to your needs, ensuring that your dining experience is nothing short of perfection.

One of the standout features of Vinoliva is its spacious and well-maintained parking facility. Finding parking in Kathmandu can often be a challenge, but Vinoliva makes it hassle-free, allowing you to focus on enjoying your meal without any worries.

Moreover, Vinoliva is truly a family-friendly establishment. The welcoming atmosphere and thoughtful amenities make it the perfect place to dine with loved ones of all ages. From high chairs for the little ones to a diverse menu that caters to various dietary preferences, Vinoliva ensures that everyone feels comfortable and satisfied.

Whether you're looking for a romantic dinner for two, a lively gathering with friends, or a memorable family outing, Vinoliva Restaurant & Bar exceeds expectations on every level. With its combination of quality food, excellent service, convenient parking, and family-friendly environment, it's no wonder that Vinoliva is a beloved dining destination in Kathmandu.

address: Narayanhiti Palace Museum North Gate Rd, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Vinoliva Restaurant and Bar is a wonderful spot with a beautiful, cozy ambiance that instantly makes you feel welcome. The service is exceptional friendly, attentive, and professional and the food is delicious and well-prepared. The live band adds a special touch, with an amazing singer who elevates the entire dining experience. Highly recommended for a great evening out in Kathmandu.

overall our experience was good. food was delicious. cocktails were great but one of the staffs weren’t familiar with the buy one get one free cocktail or mocktail on happy hour which was on the discount card. and we didn’t get the discount either because apparently they already wrote the bill so the whole card was a waste. no hard feelings, service from the staff was great, food too but the system could have be managed better.

What a cool spot. I am so glad I found the place for a meeting. We just had coffees and soda water but I got to see some of the meals being served and they look good.  Big serves too. If you want a funky place to have a chat with friends this is definitely a quiet spot out of the hassle and bussle of the main tourist area of Kathmandu.

This spot is very cute, very modern, the food was SO good!! Some of the best ive had in Kathmandu. I will definitely be back here again. My friend also got coffee and cheesecake and the dessert selection is quite impressive. Great balcony view for evening cocktails as well.

The place is aesthetically pleasing but my god it was super hot they need to install some fans around the area as the hot air is unbearable. The waiting time for the food is long but they were good. The drinks were moderate. Nothing exceptional.
The staff were chill wouldn’t say they were professional.

they are all about presentation. definitely wackkkk food and service. took more than an hour to prepare our order and yet missed one of our orders too. the fact dont dont feel sorry at all. never going again!!!
So happy to find authentic Korean food in the heart of Kathmandu. The dishes were delicious, the service was great, and the environment was very pleasant.

If you’re searching for the best Korean food in town, Koreankini is the spot to satisfy all your cravings.
I visited as one of their first customers, and it was honestly the best choice I’ve made—every single dish was 100% delicious 😋, and my friends enjoyed their meals just as much.
Go check it out and experience the flavors for yourself. 🫰

Had a great experience at Korean Kini! The food was delicious and fresh — definitely one of the best Korean flavors I’ve tried. The place itself is cozy and well-designed, which makes the whole experience even better. The staff were friendly and the service was smooth.

I really enjoyed my time here and will definitely be coming back again. Highly recommended! 👌🔥

Korean Eatery in New Road...
Beautiful and cozy amd the food is great.
Would recommend lava Bibimbap.
The service is slow though.
We got our (complimentary)  rice and soup only after we finished our main course.   Would be better if it was served together..

A place with a very nice ambience. The food was also so good and the staff were also very friendly. The price was also in an affordable range as per the taste and quality of the food.
The bibimbap was a bit bland as compared to the one that I had in Soul Cafe. But overall the food is really good.
They also gave a complementary seaweed soup with the samgyeopsal that was very unique and tasty.

address: Rooftop of Computer Bazaar Next to StarMall, Putali Sadak, काठमाडौँ 44600, Nepal
review_text: I ordered mocktail "virgin sex on the beach" which is very average can'tfeel anything except canberry juice. It taste nothing. Food is good. I will not say bad but as the competition in kathmandu here food is good not that high rating. I think this place is made for thakali food maybe.  As i didn't ordered the thakali food my food is not that bad and not that extreme good as well. Service staff are young people maybe teenagers management should give them good training as well. I found 0 knowledge of menu items because of which i feel like i ordered too much food. They should train them well. Atmospher is very good i loved it.

address: Rooftop of Computer Bazaar Next to StarMall, Putali Sadak, काठमाडौँ 44600, Nepal
review_text:
I visited City Escape  with my colleague today, hoping to enjoy a nice Thakali meal, but we were really disappointed with our experience. We ordered two veg and two chicken thalis and had to wait for around 45  minutes before being served.

Unfortunately, the food quality was very poor — the rice was hard and cold, the veg thali (Rs. 500) didn’t even include paneer or proper vegetables, and the chicken thali (Rs. 580) wasn’t much better. The vegetables and achars were very salty. The food was very tasteless.The utensils weren’t clean either, it was very dirty with lots of stain which made the whole experience worse.

Even after we politely shared our concerns, the staff didn’t apologize or offer any discount. For the price and the time we waited, it just didn’t feel worth it. When I asked for owner number they refused to give me .
The staffs were very impolite and worse. I genuinely hope the management takes this feedback seriously and improves both the food and the service — because the place has potential, but our experience was truly disappointing.

address: Rooftop of Computer Bazaar Next to StarMall, Putali Sadak, काठमाडौँ 44600, Nepal
review_text: This place literally has lost its charm. The food has lost its elegance. And the service has been worsening . Honestly it truly needs to gear up its game else won’t take much to collapse.

address: Rooftop of Computer Bazaar Next to StarMall, Putali Sadak, काठमाडौँ 44600, Nepal
review_text:
We recently visited cityscape garden grill and were thoroughly impressed by several aspects of our dining experience. The food was genuinely nice, but the star of the show for us was definitely the Thakali Khana. It was authentic, flavorful, and clearly prepared with care. If you come here, the Thakali set is a must-try.

Coupled with the beautiful environment, the whole setting made for a wonderful dining experience. The ambiance truly is a major highlight here; it’s perfect for a relaxing dinner or a special occasion.

While the quality of the food and service is undeniable, we did find the overall price to be on the expensive side. While it's a great spot for an occasional indulgence, patrons should be prepared for a slightly higher bill compared to similar options.
Overall: Highly recommended for its fantastic ambiance and delicious, authentic Thakali Khana. Just factor in the premium pricing when planning your visit!

address: Rooftop of Computer Bazaar Next to StarMall, Putali Sadak, काठमाडौँ 44600, Nepal
review_text:
A cozy space suitable for a group of 4-5. They have rooftop restaurant yet the valley is not clearly visible from all cabin. You would be lucky to find table with city's eagle view. The cabins are quite cozy.
The service was a bit slow and poor for snacks items. They love to be called a restaurant for Nepali Thali (Dal, bhat, tarkari).
Excellent Vegetable Curry and Paratha. Nice outdoor seating and very fair price with no hiiden extras like service charges and VAT 😁😁
I had best dinner here it was very good tasty biryani and mutton curry and momos
Everything is ok but the price is quite high

Wonderful environment, service was excellent and foods very good. We order momo,chaumin,pizza, kattiroll and evrythng was next level tasty and delicious.
Worth paying for the foods and all the people and service was very good and very polite service 👍 ☺️
Highly recommended and enjoy your time with your family 🙂☺️
A place where u met with good quality food

Highly Impressed!

First time in Nepal did not disappoint with Yala Cafe's Nepali Thali set. As you can see, I finished it all. The chicken sauce tho I couldn't, why? I was full and by full, I mean, FULL.

Paired with Masala Chai, it makes a perfect brunch combo.

Try it out and be impressed yourself!

I had breakfast here everyday during my stay and it was perfect ✨ The staffs were so friendly and welcoming, breakfasts were hot and delicious and very filling. A good place to just sit and have a peaceful meal. Breakfast specials come with a complimentary tea also. The bread here was some of the yummiest bread I’ve had. Thank you for making me feel so welcome and I’ll surely be back next time I visit 🥰

Yala Cafe was hands down my favorite spot during my time here. Everything was spot on:
• Service: The staff was incredibly polite and attentive. They have a great sense of timing—always there when you need them, but never intrusive. It makes for a very relaxed experience.
• Overall: Everything was simply excellent. You can tell they really care about their guests.
A must-visit if you’re in the area. I can’t recommend it enough!

The food here is absolutely delicious! Every dish was full of flavor and beautifully prepared.

The staff are incredibly friendly and attentive. They kept checking in to make sure everything was okay and took the time to thoughtfully introduce the dishes to me. Their kindness and genuine care made me feel so warm and welcomed.

The place was very nice. The interior felt warm and inviting. The food was worth the price. We ordered chicken momos, pork thali, and grilled chicken, everything was delicious, and the service was excellent. Overall, we really enjoyed the dinner and will definitely come back.

New favorite restaurant in Thamel! The atmosphere is so nice, they play house music and have comfy seating. My group had Rohit as our server twice and he was amazing! And the food was so refreshing and tasty. It wasn’t greasy at all and tasted like it was made from pretty good quality ingredients. The workers are all really great with foreigners too. Definitely would recommend

The place has a really nice ambiance and gives off strong Arba vibes. The hookah is definitely next level, and the food has a slightly different but interesting flavor. Overall, a great place to hang out.

The ambience of this restaurant is really beautiful, but unfortunately the service did not match it. I went with friends and we ordered drinks and appetizers first, but the appetizer order was not placed properly, which led to us waiting for over an hour. The drinks were okay, nothing exceptional. If you’re mainly going for the aesthetics and photos, this place works, food,didn’t have a chance to comment.

Restaurand and shisha lounge.
Located in the touristic Thamel area , to reach it , take Lift to the 5th floor , the lift has carpet styled walls , that gives special impact .
Menu is greatly various from grills , pastry , pizza , nepali , orientals , western , juices , cold and hot drinks , alchohol , shisha with 4 flavours available .
Interior Decoration is traditional styled with carpets , nepali fabrics .
There are Tables on balcony but hard in winter to manage .
There is almost daily music live performance .
Nice vibes .
Staff are welcoming and friendly .

I found the place to be overhyped as it didn’t live upto expectations for me. The hukka was definitely good however the service and food according to place was not as it was expected. Couldn’t find the parking spot for the place as well. Additionally i would say the live music was great and suited the place vibe.

I was recommended to this place by my hotel as they have the best MoMo in town, so I had to try. Let's say I ordered too much. Steamed Chicken, Fried buff, Spicy Lamb. My favourite taste wise was the Steamed Chicken, with Spicy Lamb second. I think Spicy Chicken would be amazing.  They have cooking classes too!!!  Give this place a go.

This place is a gem in Thamel! Delicious momos! The atmosphere is charming and and the owner Raj is very kind and accommodating. We enjoyed the fried mushroom and cheese momos and the chicken momos as well as the desert chocolate momos. Also the cherry beer is the best beer I have ever had. You must try this place when you come to Kathmandu!

What a cute and tiny place with some amazing momos and even more!

We had the beef ans vegetable momos + thukpa with chicken. And oh were we happy about the food. The momos were fried, soft, juicy and flavourful and the soup was just like your mom would make it when you are sick.

5/5! 😉 well deserved!

The place was quiet when I got there. I had some momos- koto! One of the best I have had since arriving in Nepal like 3 weeks ago.
Do not skip it- it is a bit low key but the food was great!

Had the buffalo momo - so good! The local beer on the side fit just right. 10 pieces of momo for one order can fill you up. The staff was really helpful and kind, too!

The restaurant is down an alley, and then turn right to go further into the block.

It was a good restaurant for grabbing something quick to eat.
Coffee to liquors, fries to thalis, hotdog to momos...one can get many options to eat.
The place is small and one has to go upstairs for dining.
Indian rupees can also be used for transactions.
I ordered an espresso here which tasted so-so.
However, cappuccino was good.
Shadar cafe is best palce to have spent good time the sevices is very good here.. & food taste is so amazing specially pizza.🍕
Good place and good food. However, the service was extremely slow. We had to wait for 30 mins to get our food.

Wrost experience ever waiting for chicken khana set too long time more than 40 minutes still doesn’t come and because of no time i leave without taking lunch bad not recommend for people who have less time

delicious food, beautiful ambitious
i love it

So me and my mom went to this place late evening as we were tired from shopping. It looked like a clean place so we were attracted by this little eatery. We ordered buff momos and coffee. The food was great for that price and everything was clean. Great find!

address: 2nd floor Durbar Mall, Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: This is my first experience in Japanese Restaurant and I must say its good experience. The interior was cozy and nice. Best part will be the sitting area on fish pool. You can enjoy your food while fishes will play with your feet 😊👍. Overall all foods are tasty and its must visit for once to feel Japanese look and feel. You can also try pure Japanese drinks like Sake Maru etc. all staffs are cooperative and attentive.

address: 2nd floor Durbar Mall, Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: From start to finish everything was perfect. All staffs were polite and welcoming. Foods were delicious. Wanted sushi platters and fried chicken. Good place to hangout. Would def go there again in future.

address: 2nd floor Durbar Mall, Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Overall fun experience. My kid loved the aqua dining. We tried the non veg combo. Ramen with chicken was bit dull, other items were good.

address: 2nd floor Durbar Mall, Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Welcoming staff and I enjoyed their non veg lunch special. This included pork ramen, sushi 4 PC, a Japanese green tea and chicken karage. A super peaceful place with delicious food and calm fish around to enjoy aqua dining experience. Will recommend 10/10 and definitely be back 😃 😊 the ramen was so good and so was the chicken karage which was tender and crispy.

address: 2nd floor Durbar Mall, Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Ambience was not very wel-coming, pretty hot and remained hot until we left. Staffs were attentive but the food was disappointing. Katsu Don: unnecessarily sweet and lacked flavor. Prawn Tempura: extra dry and too much batter. Spicy Pork Ramen: Portion was good and that was the only good thing. Pork was very cold, noodles undercooked and soup thin and lacked the creaminess.

restaurant_name: 华都24 小时餐厅（24 Hours Restaurant）
review_text: Huadu Hunan Restaurant offers a good choice of Hunan cuisine.

address: Tanka Prasad Ghumti Sadak, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Stopped by for a quick drink and snack. Got apple-tini and chicken momo. Both were delicious. Wait staff was pleasant and the location and atmosphere was amazing. I would definitely come back again to try out their menu.

address: Tanka Prasad Ghumti Sadak, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
There are very few places still remaining with this level of atmosphere. It feels like dining in a castle courtyard, as advertised. This fine-dining restaurant did not disappoint in taste or presentation; very healthy meal options were available.

Definitely a place I would recommend for special occasions.

address: Tanka Prasad Ghumti Sadak, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Definitely the go to place for a fabulous fine dining experience with an ambience that take you away from the crowded city restaurants. Spacious and comfortable.

address: Tanka Prasad Ghumti Sadak, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text:
The ambience may make it worthit for special occasions. The food itself lacks any taste whatsoever. Whether you can justify that for the price depends on who you are.
The rest is as advertised and our experience seems to be consistent with other reviews (except the ones praising food)

address: Tanka Prasad Ghumti Sadak, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
review_text: Stepping into this restaurant feels like entering a different era, with its beautiful courtyard and classical building that exude charm and elegance. The ambience is unmatched, creating a memorable dining experience. While the parking could be better managed, the overall tranquility and ambiance make up for it. The prices are on the higher side, but the experience is worth every penny for a special occasion.

Excellent roof top cafe, and true to the name has 'one tree' growing right through the cafe! Food is excellent and service is great. Food is delicious and in more than enough portions, so no qualms at all really! Several staff are also differently abled so the cafe is really doing a great service to them as well. If you are up amd about in Kathmandu, a defo recommendation from me with two thumbs up!

Very cool location, good coffee and the best part they have staff that are mute. Any coffee shop that hires staff that are typically disadvantaged in getting employment is sure to get my business.  I would highly recommend this place for a coffee,  snack or drink. They perfect place to meet up with friends.

The café is located in the center of the city and very close to the airport.The atmosphere and the place are beautiful and the staff is very courteous and polite. It was my last day in Kathmandu and I truly enjoyed it a lot. 💛✈️

Loved the environment so peaceful and the staff were so welcoming,we try Tibetan dumplings and spaghetti with meatballs it was super delicious 🤤
Pinacolada was the best ❤️highly recommended
We will be back for 👍sure

The vibe is amazing there, we went for dinner and the place wasn’t too crowded firstly the fries were alright and the fish sekuwa was good along with the chicken sekuwa plus the veg pakoras were really good and the chutney for them were even better, the tofu chilli was healthy and and had the perfect amount of spice. Something notable is that some other places make their dishes really spicy for no other reason but things taste good without lots of spice secondly the drinks were excellent too the orange juice - we could tell that they made it fresh and we enjoyed the other drinks too. Thirdly, mains were all extravagant the chicken sizzler was awesome it was nice and mild for the kids plus the pizza’s dough was fresh too , too add veg steam momo was good with paneer but it was a sharing size alongside the chicken momo was better and we finished it easily. It was nice to see the inclusion with staff and lastly the price was reasonable for 9 people.
Bad taste

Same iconic Shandar momo taste now in New Road (old NPP Newroad location). Consistent flavor like Shankhamul & Sanepa, plus a more expanded menu. Great spot in the city center.
Use the galli infront of Nepal Bank for free parking.

We had a great experience at Hankook Sarang Korean Restaurant. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, making it a nice place to relax and enjoy a meal. Our server, Subash Gurung, was amazing very friendly, attentive, and helpful throughout our visit. We ordered the rice cake and the bibimbap kimchi fried rice, and both dishes were very tasty. The flavors were rich and everything was well prepared. The service and food quality really stood out. We would definitely come back again!

I do not usually go for Korean food, but I decided to try this place out of curiosity. I am glad I did.

The space immediately felt comfortable. The vibe was relaxed and well thought out. The staff were polite, attentive, and made the experience smooth from start to finish.

The food surprised me in a good way. It was flavorful and enjoyable, even for someone who is not a regular fan of Korean cuisine. The drinks were equally well done and complemented the meal nicely.

Overall, it was a pleasant experience. Good food, friendly service, and a welcoming atmosphere. I would consider visiting again.

Been here few times over the past years. In my opinion I feel like the quality of the food or taste of the food has gone down over the years. Starting with negative, I ordered a chicken meal which had loads of bones which was very annoying to eat. Also ordered few other meals such as Kimchi Pancake which wasn't crispy but bit soggy. I didn't feel like there was much flavor at all. The only positive side was the Service was amazing due to outstanding waiter/table staff. Personally I won't be going back anytime soon however, I will recommend others to try it out.

The ambience at Hankook Sarang Korean Restaurant was really nice and cozy, giving a great dining vibe. Initially, the service was quick, and we received our first order without much wait. However, when we requested additional items later, it took more than 30 minutes to arrive, which was disappointing. The food itself was average – not bad, but not something that stood out either. Overall, a decent experience if you’re not in a rush.

We had a lovely lunch at this Korean restaurant today and were truly impressed! The food was absolutely delicious especially the authentic Korean fried chicken, which was crispy, flavorful, and a definite highlight. Our food arrived quickly, and we didn't have to wait long at all. Every dish we ordered was tasty, and the portion sizes were perfect for sharing between the two of us. We also found the prices to be very reasonable compared to other Korean spots in town. Overall, a very positive experience great food, fast service, and good value for money. We'lI definitely be coming back!
Ordered thukpa chicken, a Tibetan soup, it was thick and tasty. The fried chicken came later after 3 minutes of the soup.
Food is too good. Service also. Recommended restaurant and bar in Thamel.

The establishment offers a delightful dining experience with a warm and inviting atmosphere. I highly recommend this place to tourists looking to savor local flavors and enjoy exceptional service. The music was great and relaxing as well.

I just got back from hiking to everest base camp and this was the worst food I've had in 2 weeks. we sat and waited for about an hour for 2 small pizzas, we were the ONLY PEOPLE THERE. they didn't have any of the alcohol they listed on their menu and the owner had to leave to go buy it while we waited. we finally got our pizzas and got back to our hotel and had to throw it all away. it was the most uncooked soggy food poisoning laden garbage I've ever paid money for.imagime a frozen pizza that you put in a washing machine and then crumbled raw meat onto it. this might be like the 4th time in my life I've written an online review but when something is this bad you need to warn others. also the bathroom was more grotesque than any we encountered at 17000 feet, this place puts the lazy in lazy monk.

Food and prices were fine, but I couldn't eat in peace since there was a guy who kept pestering me to visit a nearby gallery. He claimed to be an employee of the restaurant and an artist, neither of which I suspect is true. Lazy Monk shouldn't tolerate this annoying character for he's chasing customers away.

This was the first time I visited Dalle Momo. The first bite of momo was tasteless. I felt Dalle is overrated. Then I ate the momo with Dalle achaar! Oh my god! The taste changed along with the achaar! It was soo good! Then I realized why it's named Dalle MoMo!

I keep revisiting the place for there hot chilli sauce. Tasted dalle special jhol momo for the first time and I loved it, the momo melted inside my mouth. Choila chowmein tasted like a regular local chowmein.

Staffs were good too. Loved every experience except them still adding VAT on the bills.
The momos here are absolutely delicious! The filling is flavorful🫶
Nice food and well maintained ambience. The staff were friendly. The momo was amazing as always.
The momo was decent, but the staff impressed me the most. She was very professional and hospitable

The best ambiance I could ask for a dinner. The food was new to me, so can’t comment on the taste. Must try item is the rice beer. Affordable price for that ambiance. Must go place if u visit Katmandu.
Ultimate newari food place around basantapur with the interiors and ambience nth less than a royal palace with live at top terrace seating area

I stumbled upon this restaurant by chance. It is newly opened.  Everything tasted amazing, the Chang (Nepalese rice wine)  being my absolute favourite! Above all, the staff are super friendly and hospitable. More people should know about this place in my opinion! Highly recommended for someone who prefer to have an authentic Newari cuisine.I will definitely come back here!

Authentic Taste & Amazing Vibes ⭐
This Newari restaurant truly impressed me! The food was rich in authentic Newari flavors …every dish tasted just like tradition should. The atmosphere was beautiful, with great decor and a warm, welcoming vibe. The live music added the perfect touch, lifting the mood and making the whole experience even better. It’s the perfect spot to chill on weekends with friends …great food, good music, and amazing service. Highly recommended!

Very disappointing. Rice beer was too sweet, feels like too much sugar has been mixed. Food was not as authentic as Newari dishes are. Had ordered sukuti, it was very tiny as if the onion was sliced in very tiny pieces. Sabbu Maicha, was too hard, could not even pull out the thread. Environmentally, it was nice but the toilet was very dirty, flushes didn't work,  water all over the floor.
Me and my friend had our first nepalese meal here. We had chowmein, chicken curry, momos. They were great . 👍 i will definitely come again. Thanks Kiran for cooking good meal!! 🥘
It’s very pleasant to have curry rice 🌾 here. Love it 😍 the cook is very hospitable to talk and share with customers.
Very delicious food and good staff love to visit again highly recommend guys 🫶

Amazing food with budget friendly price.
Must visit in the heart of Thamel, is open late night.

A good restaurant needs to nail two things; good food and great service. The food here was above average, the paneer butter masala was tasty, the tawa roti was okay, and the biryani tasted more like chicken fried rice. The service, however, was disappointing. The staff barely spoke, which added to the uneasy feeling, and they kept nudging each other to approach us, as if no one wanted to serve. The wait was longer than expected, and I was given plain roti instead of butter. The place felt plain and quiet, with no music or atmosphere. It’s also on the pricier side, which makes the experience hard to justify. I don’t plan on coming back.

Craving authentic Korean in Thamel? 🍲 Check out Bibimbap Korean Restaurant in Jyatha!
The food was delicious and the space was impressively clean. While the service was a little slow, the roadside views and easy parking made the wait much better. Definitely worth a visit for a tasty meal! 🇰🇷✨

I’m sorry to say that my experience at Bibimbap Korean Restaurant was quite disappointing. I ordered the Jjajangmyeon, as it looked very appealing in the pictures, but unfortunately the taste did not meet expectations. The dish was pale, lacked flavor, and the noodles even had an unpleasant smell. When I mentioned this to the waiter, I was told that the food “always tastes the same,” which made me feel even more disheartened.

I still paid the bill without making a fuss, but I truly regretted the visit. Hopefully, the restaurant can improve on the quality and taste of this dish in the future.

I had pork rib strew two times here. First time pork is tender but second time pork is too chewy. The flavor is good, but hygiene could be better as I found hairs in my food. Food is very spicy in general… Overall is good.

Same here a few times. The spicy pork with gochujung and sauce is very good served with plenty of fresh lettuce, tanjung, sliced garlic, and kimchi. The banchon doesn’t have proper Korean namul, but maybe they can’t get the vegetables here?  They make the chicken dish with sliced breast meat and not chicken thighs, so it’s dry and not recommended.

We had bibimbap and kimbap in this place and it was a bomb! Really enjoyed how tasty it was and a big portion too. Got 5 side dishes and the tteokbokki was also good and the kimchi soup we had was really nice.

Ate here for 3 nights during our rest in Thamel after a long hike.
